name: year-picker-context
visual_summary: A year-picker context provides state management for year-picker visibility and calendar grid slots. It's used to control the year-picker open/close state and keep the public API clean. Developers would use this component in calendar or range calendar components where they need to show or hide the year-picker.
generation_prompt:
